verses.text: The psalmist recalls how God restored His land's fortunes and forgave His people's iniquity, turning from His anger. Past mercy grounds present prayer. Remembering pardon emboldens us to seek revival again.

The psalmist recalls how God restored His land's fortunes and forgave His people's iniquity, turning from His anger. Past mercy grounds present prayer. Remembering pardon emboldens us to seek revival again.

The psalmist recalls how God restored His land's fortunes and forgave His people's iniquity, turning from His anger. Past mercy grounds present prayer. Remembering pardon emboldens us to seek revival again.

'Turn us, O God of our salvation,' he prays; 'wilt thou not revive us again, that thy people may rejoice in thee?' He longs for renewed life and joy. True revival is God turning His people back to gladness in Himself.

'Turn us, O God of our salvation,' he prays; 'wilt thou not revive us again, that thy people may rejoice in thee?' He longs for renewed life and joy. True revival is God turning His people back to gladness in Himself.

'Turn us, O God of our salvation,' he prays; 'wilt thou not revive us again, that thy people may rejoice in thee?' He longs for renewed life and joy. True revival is God turning His people back to gladness in Himself.

'Turn us, O God of our salvation,' he prays; 'wilt thou not revive us again, that thy people may rejoice in thee?' He longs for renewed life and joy. True revival is God turning His people back to gladness in Himself.

He resolves to listen, for 'the LORD will speak peace unto his people,' His salvation near to those who fear Him. Quiet attention awaits God's word. The God who is sought speaks peace to the reverent heart.

He resolves to listen, for 'the LORD will speak peace unto his people,' His salvation near to those who fear Him. Quiet attention awaits God's word. The God who is sought speaks peace to the reverent heart.
'Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed.' Attributes that seemed opposed embrace. In the gospel, God's justice and mercy meet in perfect harmony through Christ.
'Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed.' Attributes that seemed opposed embrace. In the gospel, God's justice and mercy meet in perfect harmony through Christ.

The LORD will give what is good, the land yield her increase, and righteousness go before Him as He comes. Blessing follows His presence. Where God draws near, fruitfulness and holiness flourish together.
